The analysis encountered a technical error when attempting to calculate the total revenue from tariffs for December 2019. The error occurred during the electricity generation calculation, specifically when trying to multiply installation data with efficiency factors and days in the month. This suggests there may be data type inconsistencies in the assumptions sheet, where some values might be stored as text strings rather than numeric values, preventing proper mathematical operations. To resolve this issue and provide the accurate answer, the data would need to be cleaned and properly formatted to ensure all numerical calculations can be performed correctly.
